query: UPDATE orders SET shippingStatus = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."出貨狀態"')) WHERE rawData IS NOT NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."出貨狀態"') IS NOT NULL AND shippingStatus IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user VDyW8BBNx15QJxW.root --database DN8ihETPKNPmGxAqBwYu7X --execute UPDATE orders SET shippingStatus = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."出貨狀態"')) WHERE rawData IS NOT NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."出貨狀態"') IS NOT NULL AND shippingStatus IS NULL;
